---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for DataPrime
title: "✨ [Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## 🚀 Problem Statement / Use Case

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g. "I'm always frustrated when...")

## 💡 Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. What are the key features or UI changes?

## 🎨 Alternative Solutions

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context, designs, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
